title: E2E Real Testing — LocalStack Scan → Finding → Fix → Verify Full Cycle
description: test_e2e_real.py and scripts/e2e_real_test.py implement a real scan → finding → fix cycle against LocalStack. TestScannerLogic detects hardcoded passwords and SQLi patterns. Gap: the E2E cycle stops at finding detection — it does not exercise the full Find→Fix→Verify loop through postfix_verifier.py, and the LocalStack-dependent tests are not run in CI due to missing LocalStack setup in GitHub Actions.
missing: CI LocalStack setup: add LocalStack docker-compose service to GitHub Actions E2E workflow so test_e2e_real.py runs on every PR without skipping
Fix→Verify loop: extend E2E test to apply an auto-fix via postfix_verifier and assert that the re-scan no longer detects the vulnerability
MPTE exploit retest: after fix verification, replay the original MPTE exploit payload against the patched endpoint and assert 4xx/no-injection response
